text: @kittykthxbai Well, we could assume that she said it in the order we see, and that would be Mello first (because he's in the left) and Near second (because he's in the right), and, therefore, Mello has nuts and Near hasn't. But, on the other hand, japanese read from right to left, so being Death Note a japanese anime, it's probably that Near is actually the first and Mello the second, so Near would have nuts. But maybe Misa said it in her point of view, turning all again.[/Death Note]
